content: someone can share some knowledge about this event?
Use the crystal ball thing you get from dailies to unlock a character story. That's basically it.
The actual event-event if a collection of stages that unlock one per day. Clear each stage at once, then just clear the highest you can/get the mats you need for uncapping/upgrading.
Use your stamina to grind it for the flowers, then use the flowers to spin the gacha box reward.
yeah just unlocked couple hours ago
so im able to do only lvl 20 for now
You only have to clear each stage once for the achievements, it doesnt care what difficulty you clear it on.
So you're fine.
yeah game pretty good
The other achievements are for clearing stages x amount of times which you'll get done by just using your stamina.

In a Quest,
1. once a enemy die, gain 2 Coins.
2. once the wearer kill a enemy, +10% crt dmg in this quest. Up to 5 stacks.
Can you stack that buff to the final boss fight?

yes.
